title: Pseudo Anonymised Medical History of Illnesses from Questionnaire R0
description: Variables from the medical history section of the first round of questionnaire for The Generations Study about the participant's history of other chronic illnesses. This data has been pseudo-anonymised by removing any personal identifiable information (PII) and shifting dates from their original data.

R0_Diabetes.x-question: Have you ever been diagnosed with diabetes?
R0_Diabetes.description: Indicates whether the participant reports a medical diagnosis of diabetes at any time prior to questionnaire completion.

R0_DiabetesAge.x-question: If yes, at what age was diabetes diagnosed?
R0_DiabetesAge.description: Participant's age (in completed years) when diabetes was first diagnosed (if applicable).

R0_TreatedWithInsulin.description: Whether the participant is currently receiving insulin treatment.

R0_ThyroidDisease.x-question: Have you ever been diagnosed with any thyroid disease or thyroid problems?
R0_ThyroidDisease.description: Indicates whether the participant reports any thyroid condition diagnosed by a clinician.

R0_ThyroidDiseaseType.x-question: If yes, what was the disease or problem? (Hyperthyroidism, Hypothyroidism, Thyroid cyst(s), Other)
R0_ThyroidDiseaseType.description: Coded type of thyroid disease reported by the participant, when thyroid disease is present.

ThyroidTreatment.description: Per-episode details for thyroid drug treatment (up to 2 episodes as captured in the instrument).

R0_ThyroidTreatment_Age.x-question: At what age did you start the thyroid treatment?
R0_ThyroidTreatment_Age.description: Age (in years) when this thyroid treatment episode began.

R0_ThyroidTreatment_Yrs.x-question: How long did you take the treatment for thyroid? - Years
R0_ThyroidTreatment_Yrs.description: Duration of this thyroid treatment episode in whole years.

R0_ThyroidTreatment_Mnths.x-question: How long did you take the treatment for thyroid? - Months
R0_ThyroidTreatment_Mnths.description: Additional duration of this thyroid treatment episode in whole months.

R0_ThyroidTreatment_Still.x-question: Are you still using the treatment for thyroid?
R0_ThyroidTreatment_Still.description: Whether this thyroid treatment episode is ongoing at the time of questionnaire completion.

R0_ThyroidTreatment_MoreTwo.x-question: Have you taken more than two thyroid drug treatments or used them in more than two episodes?
R0_ThyroidTreatment_MoreTwo.description: Indicator that the participant's thyroid treatment history exceeds two distinct treatment episodes.
x-enumDescriptions: 1: More than two thyroid drug treatments or used them in more than two episodes

R0_Blind.x-question: Are you registered as blind or partially sighted?
R0_Blind.description: Self-report of registration status for blindness or partial sight.

R0_Gallstones.x-question: Have you ever been diagnosed with gallstones?
R0_Gallstones.description: Self-reported history of medically diagnosed gallstones.

R0_Gallstones_Age.x-question: If yes, at what age were you diagnosed with gallstones?
R0_Gallstones_Age.description: Age (in completed years) when gallstones were first diagnosed.

R0_Cholecystectomy.x-question: Have you ever had your gallbladder removed (cholecystectomy)?

R0_Cholecystectomy_Age.x-question: If yes, at what age was your gallbladder removed?
R0_Cholecystectomy_Age.description: Age (in completed years) at the time of cholecystectomy.

R0_BrokenHip.x-question: Have you ever been told by a doctor that you had a broken (fractured) hip?
R0_BrokenHip.description: Self-reported history of a doctor-diagnosed hip fracture.

R0_HipFractureYear_Shifted.name: R0_HipFractureYear_Shifted
R0_HipFractureYear_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised year. The date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of the reported year, shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year of the shifted date is stored. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_BrokenHip_Age.x-question: If yes, at what age did you break your hip for the first time?
R0_BrokenHip_Age.description: Age (in completed years) at the first hip fracture.

R0_EatingDisorder.x-question: Have you ever had an eating disorder for which you saw your doctor or that caused you to temporarily lose your periods?
R0_EatingDisorder.description: Categorical indicator of eating disorder history, including whether it involved medical consultation and/or temporary amenorrhea.
x-enumDescriptions: 4: Consulted a doctor and periods temporarily stopped
5: Yes, but did not consult a doctor or lose periods (or not stated)

EatingDisorderEpisodes.description: Per-episode details for eating disorders (up to 3 episodes captured).

R0_ED_DrAge.x-question: If you saw a doctor for the eating disorder, at what age did this first happen?
R0_ED_DrAge.description: Age (in years) at first medical consultation for this eating disorder episode (if applicable).

R0_ED_DrAgeNA.x-question: If you saw a doctor for the eating disorder, at what age did this first happen? - not applicable
R0_ED_DrAgeNA.description: Flag that doctor consultation is not applicable for this episode.

R0_ED_LostPeriods_Age.x-question: If you lost your periods due to the eating disorder, at what age did it first occur?
R0_ED_LostPeriods_Age.description: Age (in years) at onset of temporary absence of periods for this episode (if applicable).

R0_ED_LostPeriods_AgeNA.x-question: If you lost your periods due to the eating disorder, at what age did it first occur? - not applicable
R0_ED_LostPeriods_AgeNA.description: Flag that loss of periods is not applicable for this episode.

R0_ED_LostPeriods_Yrs.x-question: How long did you lose your periods during the eating disorder? - Years
R0_ED_LostPeriods_Yrs.description: Duration of lost periods during this episode, in years.

R0_ED_LengthLostPeriod_Mnths.x-question: How long did you lose your periods during the eating disorder? - Months
R0_ED_LengthLostPeriod_Mnths.description: Additional duration of lost periods during this episode, in months.

R0_ED_PreWeight_st.x-question: What was your weight before the onset of the eating disorder? - Stone
R0_ED_PreWeight_st.description: Weight in stone immediately prior to the onset of this episode.

R0_ED_PreWeight_lb.x-question: What was your weight before the onset of the eating disorder? - Pounds

R0_ED_PreWeight_kg.x-question: What was your weight before the onset of the eating disorder? - Kilograms
R0_ED_PreWeight_kg.description: Weight in kilograms immediately prior to the onset of this episode.

R0_ED_GainLoss.x-question: Did you gain or lose weight during your 1st eating disorder, or did your weight stay the same on average? (Gained, Lost, Stayed same)
R0_ED_GainLoss.description: Self-reported weight change pattern during the first eating disorder episode.

R0_ED_LowWeight_st.x-question: If you lost weight during the eating disorder, what was your lowest weight during this period? - Stone
R0_ED_LowWeight_st.description: Lowest weight reached during this episode, stone component.

R0_ED_LowWeight_lb.x-question: If you lost weight during the eating disorder, what was your lowest weight during this period? - Pounds

R0_ED_LowWeight_kg.x-question: If you lost weight during the eating disorder, what was your lowest weight during this period? - Kilograms
R0_ED_LowWeight_kg.description: Lowest weight reached during this episode, kilograms.

R0_ED_HighWeight_st.x-question: If you gained weight during the eating disorder, what was your greatest weight during this period? - Stone
R0_ED_HighWeight_st.description: Highest weight reached during this episode, stone component.

R0_ED_HighWeight_lb.x-question: If you gained weight during the eating disorder, what was your greatest weight during this period? - Pounds

R0_ED_HighWeight_kg.x-question: If you gained weight during the eating disorder, what was your greatest weight during this period? - Kilograms
R0_ED_HighWeight_kg.description: Highest weight reached during this episode, kilograms.

EatingDisorderExtra.description: Additional flags and timing for subsequent eating disorder episodes (allows up to 2).

R0_ED_ConsultDr.x-question: Have you ever had an eating disorder for which you saw a doctor?
R0_ED_ConsultDr.description: Flag that a doctor was consulted for this subsequent episode.

R0_ED_LostPeriods.x-question: Have you ever had an eating disorder that caused you to temporarily lose your periods? (yes)
R0_ED_LostPeriods.description: Flag that periods were temporarily lost during this subsequent episode.

R0_ED_ConsultDrPeriods.x-question: Have you ever had an eating disorder with both doctor consultation and temporary loss of periods? (yes)
R0_ED_ConsultDrPeriods.description: Flag that both doctor consultation and loss of periods occurred for this episode.

R0_ED_General.x-question: Have you ever had an eating disorder? (yes)
R0_ED_General.description: General flag that a subsequent eating disorder episode occurred.

R0_EatingDisorderDoctor_Start_Shifted.name: R0_EatingDisorderDoctor_Start_Shifted
R0_EatingDisorderDoctor_Start_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_ED_PeriodsMth.x-question: At what month did you lose your periods during the eating disorder?
R0_ED_PeriodsMth.description: Calendar month of onset of temporary loss of periods during this episode.

R0_ED_PeriodsYr.x-question: At what year did you lose your periods during the eating disorder?
R0_ED_PeriodsYr.description: Calendar year of onset of temporary loss of periods during this episode.

R0_ED_Age.x-question: What age did the eating disorder happen?
R0_ED_Age.description: Participant age (in years) when this episode occurred.

R0_ED_FromAge.x-question: From what age did the eating disorder happen?

R0_ED_ToAge.x-question: To what age did the eating disorder happen?

R0_ED_Ongoing.description: Whether this eating disorder episode is ongoing.

R0_EatingDisorder_2_Shifted.name: R0_EatingDisorder_2_Shifted
R0_EatingDisorder_2_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_EatingDisorder_2_RangeStart_Shifted.name: R0_EatingDisorder_2_RangeStart_Shifted
R0_EatingDisorder_2_RangeStart_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_EatingDisorder_2_RangeEnd_Shifted.name: R0_EatingDisorder_2_RangeEnd_Shifted
R0_EatingDisorder_2_RangeEnd_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_ED_ToYr.x-question: To which year did the eating disorder happen?

R0_ED_WeightGain.x-question: Did you gain or lose weight during the eating disorder, or did your weight stay the same on average? - Gained
R0_ED_WeightGain.description: Flag indicating weight gain occurred during this episode.

R0_ED_WeightLoss.x-question: Did you gain or lose weight during the eating disorder, or did your weight stay the same on average? - Lost
R0_ED_WeightLoss.description: Flag indicating weight loss occurred during this episode.

R0_ED_WeightSame.x-question: Did you gain or lose weight during the eating disorder, or did your weight stay the same on average? - Stayed same
R0_ED_WeightSame.description: Flag indicating weight remained stable during this episode.

R0_ED_WeightFluctuate.x-question: Did you gain or lose weight during the eating disorder, or did your weight stay the same on average? - Lost and gained weight
R0_ED_WeightFluctuate.description: Flag indicating both loss and gain occurred during this episode.

R0_ED_MoreEpisodes.x-question: If you had further separate episodes of eating disorder, please provide details.
R0_ED_MoreEpisodes.description: Indicator that additional eating disorder episodes exist beyond those captured above.

R0_ED_MoreThanThree.x-question: Are there more than 3 episodes of eating disorder?
R0_ED_MoreThanThree.description: Flag indicating the participant experienced more than three distinct eating disorder episodes.
